findings.evidence: Lines 63-65 claim compatibility is needed; lines 121-128 document/prove second-slot complex linearity without compatibility, lines 169-172 use only `ω.Invariant J`, and lines 143-145 use only `ω.Tames J`.
findings.fix: Rewrite this sentence to say the bare definition needs no extra hypotheses and the later Hermitian facts are proved under their stated hypotheses, with full compatibility only needed to assemble `Compatible.hermitianCore`.
findings.issue: The `complexAssociatedForm` docstring says the Hermitian-structure facts need `J² = -1` and compatibility, but the file immediately proves several of these under strictly weaker hypotheses: `complexAssociatedForm_smul_right` has no compatibility hypothesis, `Invariant.hermitianForm_conj_symm` needs only invariance, and `Tames.hermitianForm_self_re_pos` needs only tameness.

summary: The new file has module-level and declaration-level documentation, but one public docstring misstates the hypotheses needed for the advertised facts.
